_description: Reference: dynamic gallery block (W4.3). 4 layouts (masonry/grid/carousel/spotlight) + cross-cutting `lightbox` prop. The `spotlight` layout forces lightbox=true; other layouts make it optional.

props._note_on_layouts: masonry/grid/carousel/spotlight — see component_versions for the per-layout prop schema. Spotlight always forces lightbox=true regardless of the prop value.
